functions.name: iam_actions.generate.services.create_services
documentation:
Return service definitions created from the given policy object.

The input dict's "serviceMap" element is converted from a map keyed
on the service name to a map keyed on "StringPrefix".

modules.name: iam_actions.generate.notifier
documentation:
Upload generated JSON files to S3 to track revisions.

The JSON files written by iam_actions.generate.run can be given to this
script to upload them to S3 and notify about any changes since the
previous run.

The environment variable S3_BUCKET defines the bucket that will store
the uploaded files, and WEBHOOK optionally defines a Slack hook URL to
send notifications.
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
Copyright 2020-2022 Big Bad Wolf Security, LLC

documentation: Return an `argparse.ArgumentParser` defining the CLI.

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.notifier.main
documentation: This is the entry point function.

modules.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map
documentation:
Define and create action structures.

Calling `create_action_map` with a dict from the services module is the
main entry point for this module.
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
Copyright 2020-2022 Big Bad Wolf Security, LLC

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map.process_actions_table
documentation: Return a list of actions, one per row of the given table.

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map.generate_action_map
documentation:
Return a tuple of service actions and any errors encountered.

The given service name has its documentation URLs searched for
action definitions.  They are then compared with the given known
service action names to find undocumented actions.  The whole set of
actions is then returned as a dict keyed on their names, alongside a
list of any error messages.

classes.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map.AccessLevel

methods.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map.AccessLevel.__repr__
documentation: Represent `AccessLevel` items as their bare string values.
Enumerate the possible action "AccessLevel" item values.

classes.name: iam_actions.generate.action_map.ActionMap
documentation: Define the structure of an AWS action definition.

modules.name: iam_actions.generate.generate
documentation:
Generate and write the JSON files.

This module runs all of the other module code to fetch current action
and service information from Amazon, and it outputs the restructured
data as JSON files.  It is only intended to be run as a script, e.g.
with "python -m iam_actions.generate".  The CLI is described using the
"--help" argument.
SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
Copyright 2020-2023 Big Bad Wolf Security, LLC

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.generate.create_argument_parser
documentation: Return an `argparse.ArgumentParser` defining the CLI.

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.generate.run
documentation: This is the entry point function.

methods.name: iam_actions.generate.generate.JSONEncoderDataclass.default
documentation: Return a presumed order-preserving dict for dataclasses.
Define a JSON encoder that knows how to handle dataclasses.

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.aws_docs.missing_services
documentation:
Return a set of undefined service names.

AWS posts a TOC JSON object with all their services.  Its service
names are compared to the URL map to detect if any are missing.

documentation: Get a list of soup tags for a service

functions.name: iam_actions.generate.aws_docs.fetch_docs_for_services
documentation: Main entrypoint

methods.name: iam_actions.generate.aws_docs.AwsDocumentationPage.find_table_for_headers
documentation:
Locate the actions table element in the web page.

The table IDs seem to change, so search by div then look for the
table headers that match the expected structure, e.g.:

    <div class="table-container">
        <div class="table-contents">
            <table id="w468aac34c13c27d782c11b9">
                <tr>
                    <th>Actions</th>
                    <th>Description</th>
                    <th>Access Level</th>
                    <th>Resource Types (*required)</th>
                    <th>Condition Keys</th>
                    <th>Dependent Actions</th>
                </tr>

methods.name: iam_actions.generate.aws_docs.AwsDocumentationPage.flat_action_map_table
documentation:
Return a table element as a list of lists of strings.

The AWS actions table sometimes can be a mess, so flatten it before
doing any processing.  This involves tracking rowspans and
concatenating table cells where appropriate.

Assumptions:
- The first cell of each row contains its maximum rowspan.
- Cells for rows bound by the maximum rowspan can be concatenated.
- The first row in a rowspan contains the required six cells.
- If the first cell starts with SCENARIO, the AWS writer was drunk.
